body: Hi {business_name} - William from {shipping_company_name} (239-398-5676). Customers expect 2-day shipping now. We get your orders out same-day for less. Free setup consultation. Want it? Text YES. Reply STOP to opt out.
notes: Fulfillment speed focus - appeals to e-commerce businesses losing to Amazon
value_proposition: Same-day fulfillment to compete with Amazon Prime expectations

variants.body: {business_name}: Losing sales to Amazon's 2-day shipping? We match it for less than you pay now. Same-day pick-pack-ship. William, {shipping_company_name} (239-398-5676). Text YES for details. Reply STOP to opt out.

Hi {business_name} - customers abandon carts if shipping takes 5+ days. We guarantee 2-day delivery for your orders. {shipping_company_name}. William (239) 398-5676. Interested? Text YES. Reply STOP to opt out.
